name: research-autopilot
description: Plugin-first research operating layer for Codex with routing, squads, and pipeline gates.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Codex into a research operating layer with route explanations, squads, and explicit gates.
interface.longDescription: Research Autopilot is the public plugin layer of Codex Research Stack. It explains the route before execution, upgrades project work into readable squads instead of role-play, and keeps citation, writing, social-evidence, and reproducibility workflows behind explicit contracts.
defaultPrompt: Route this research task automatically and explain the plan before execution.
Show which research route, quality gates, and profiles this task needs.
Turn this project task into a structured multi-agent dispatch.
